ERA-Engine Document
Table of Contents

Class Log

Namespace
EraEngine.Source.Utils
Assembly
era-engine.dll

Log helper for printing structured log entries across different severity levels.

public static class Log
Inheritance
object
Log

object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()

object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Properties

EnableConsoleOutput

Indicates whether log entries are written to the Godot console.

public static bool EnableConsoleOutput { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

EnableDebuggerOutput

Indicates whether log entries are pushed to the Godot debugger.

public static bool EnableDebuggerOutput { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

EnableViewOutput

Indicates whether log entries are forwarded to the View module.

public static bool EnableViewOutput { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

MinimumLevel

The minimum LogLevel required for a message to be logged.

public static LogLevel MinimumLevel { get; set; }

Property Value

LogLevel

Methods

Debug(string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int)

Logs a debug message at the Debug level. For more information, see Print(LogLevel, string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int).

public static void Debug(string message, Exception? exception = null, object? data = null, string? member = null, string? file = null, int line = 0)

Parameters

message string
exception Exception
data object
member string
file string
line int

Error(string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int)

Logs an error message at the Error level. For more information, see Print(LogLevel, string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int).

public static void Error(string message, Exception? exception = null, object? data = null, string? member = null, string? file = null, int line = 0)

Parameters

message string
exception Exception
data object
member string
file string
line int

Fatal(string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int)

Logs a critical message at the Critical level. For more information, see Print(LogLevel, string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int).

public static void Fatal(string message, Exception? exception = null, object? data = null, string? member = null, string? file = null, int line = 0)

Parameters

message string
exception Exception
data object
member string
file string
line int

GetAbbreviation(LogLevel)

Returns an abbreviation for the LogLevel.

public static string GetAbbreviation(this LogLevel level)

Parameters

level LogLevel

Returns

string

Info(string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int)

Logs an informational message at the Information level. For more information, see Print(LogLevel, string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int).

public static void Info(string message, Exception? exception = null, object? data = null, string? member = null, string? file = null, int line = 0)

Parameters

message string
exception Exception
data object
member string
file string
line int

IsEnabled(LogLevel)

Determines whether the LogLevel is enabled for logging.

public static bool IsEnabled(LogLevel level)

Parameters

level LogLevel

Returns

bool

Print(LogLevel, string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int)

Prints a message to the console and/or View if the level is enabled.

public static void Print(LogLevel level, string message, Exception? exception = null, object? data = null, string? callerMemberName = null, string? callerFilePath = null, int callerLineNumber = 0)

Parameters

level LogLevel

The severity level of the log entry.

message string

The message content of the log entry.

exception Exception

An optional exception associated with the log entry.

data object

An optional context object providing additional information.

callerMemberName string

The name of the calling member. Automatically supplied by the compiler.

callerFilePath string

The full path of the source file. Automatically supplied by the compiler.

callerLineNumber int

The line number within the source file. Automatically supplied by the compiler.

Trace(string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int)

Logs a verbose message at the Trace level. For more information, see Print(LogLevel, string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int).

public static void Trace(string message, Exception? exception = null, object? data = null, string? member = null, string? file = null, int line = 0)

Parameters

message string
exception Exception
data object
member string
file string
line int

Warn(string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int)

Logs a warning message at the Warning level. For more information, see Print(LogLevel, string, Exception?, object?, string?, string?, int).

public static void Warn(string message, Exception? exception = null, object? data = null, string? member = null, string? file = null, int line = 0)

Parameters

message string
exception Exception
data object
member string
file string
line int
